questions.question: Describe the steps involved in using CDH and HUE to analyze a sample dataset. Please provide a brief overview of each step. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Please provide a detailed explanation of each step

questions.question: What is the purpose of HUE in the data analysis process? Provide an example of how you would use HUE to connect to a sample Hadoop cluster and create a new dataset. (15 marks)
questions.hint: Please provide a clear explanation of the purpose of HUE and an example use case

questions.question: Using CDH and HUE, create a simple report to analyze the average temperature and precipitation data for a given month. Please include a brief explanation of your approach and any relevant calculations. (20 marks)
questions.hint: Please provide a clear explanation of your approach and any relevant calculations
